use_cases: Displaying product features with expandable details on SaaS landing pages
Organizing feature comparisons in a collapsible sidebar layout
Presenting FAQ sections with expandable answers
Showcasing product capabilities in an e-commerce settings panel
Displaying documentation sections with nested content
ai_summary: An accordion-based feature section component that displays expandable feature items, each containing a title, image, and detailed description. Built with shadcn/ui components and styled with Tailwind CSS for a clean, responsive layout. The component uses click-to-reveal interaction patterns where users can expand individual feature panels to read more details, making it ideal for organizing large amounts of feature content on product pages or documentation sites.
